---
title: 'VQ-LLM: High-performance Code Generation for Vector Quantization Augmented
  LLM Inference'
author:
- Zihan Liu
- Xinhao Luo
- Junxian Guo
- Wentao Ni
- Yangjie Zhou
- Yue Guan
- Cong Guo
- Weihao Cui
- Yu Feng
- Minyi Guo
- Yuhao Zhu
- Minjia Zhang
- Jingwen Leng
- Chen Jin
categories:
- Show All
- Work We Contributed to
topics:
- mlsys
url_source: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2503.02236
journ: HPCA
year: 2025
contrib: Work We Contributed to
image: featured.png
pub_number: 88
---
